title: Hiring Production Engineer at EPC Industrie International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at EPC Industrie International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
EPC Industrie International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About EPC Industrie International Enterprises:
EPC Industrie International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EPC Industrie International Enterprises!
